notes: Official texts: Clubs next to Rampart have +X Power; The clubs next to Outlaw have +X Power.
Uses one generic ordered FOR_EACH sub-pipeline over SELECT_ADJACENT output.
Official text: For each Hybrid club in your bag, that club and Ember each gain +X Power.
Uses the shared matching_targets_and_source_per_match pattern; only selection and filtering are configured.
Official text: Shots from Drivers, Woods, and Hybrids bounce X% less.
The official per-level value is exposed as an additive bounce_reduction_percent modifier on Driver, Wood, and Hybrid targets.
This representation does not model trajectory or infer how multiple reduction effects stack.
Official text: Your other clubs gain +X control.
Uses the generic ordered bag-target pipeline with include_source=false and stat=control.
Official text: Your clubs launch the ball with a 10° higher angle.
The official per-level value is exposed as the additive static modifier loft_angle_degrees.
Official text: Common and Rare clubs have +X to all stats.
Uses a generic bag selection, rarity filter and ordered multi-stat application pipeline.
Official text: Your other clubs gain +X power and spin, but lose X control.
Both signed values are read independently from the official level components, including Elite +4/-3.
Official text: All clubs in your bag gain +X Spin.
Uses the generic ordered bag-target pipeline with include_source=true and stat=spin.
Official text: Your ball bounces X% less against all terrain.
The official per-level value is exposed as the source club's additive bounce_reduction_percent modifier.
This representation does not model trajectory or infer how multiple reduction effects stack.
Official text: The club to the left of Cyclotron produces strokes with less bounce.
The official per-level percentage is exposed as bounce_reduction_percent on the immediately adjacent club to the left.
This representation does not model trajectory or infer how multiple bounce-reduction effects stack.
Official text: Has +X power per Willoughsby club next to Steward.
This structural label uses the exact validated pipeline already configured for label:brand_loyalty_x.
The source club receives power equal to its official level value multiplied by the number of adjacent clubs with the same brand.
The semantic interpretation still requires final in-game validation.
Official text: The club to the left of Galvanizer has +X control.
Uses the generic left-neighbor stat-bonus pipeline with stat=control.
Official text: Has +X power for each Driver next to People's Champion.
Uses the generic adjacent-filter-count-scale-stat pipeline with MATCH_TYPE(expected=driver).
Official text: Your other clubs have +X Power if you have no Irons or Wedges.
Uses the shared absent_types_stat_bonus pattern with all non-source clubs as targets.
Official text: Your clubs have double fade and draw.
The official x2 value is exposed as the objective static modifier fade_draw_multiplier on every club in the bag.
This representation does not simulate shot shaping or infer how multiple multiplier sources stack.
Official text: The clubs next to Steward have +X Power. This bonus is doubled for Willoughsby Clubs.
The second pass applies the same value only to adjacent clubs matching the source brand, producing exactly 2X without special-case multiplication.
Official text: Forester clubs have +X Power.
Uses the generic ordered brand-target pipeline with stat=power.
Official text: This club gains +X Power if there are no Irons or Wedges in the bag.
Uses the shared absent_types_stat_bonus pattern with the source club as the sole target.
Official text: Launches the ball with a 5° higher angle than other hybrids.
The official per-level value is exposed as the additive static modifier loft_angle_degrees.
Official text: For each Nautilus club next to Wave, that club and Wave each gain +X Power.
Uses the shared matching_targets_and_source_per_match pattern; only selection and filtering are configured.
Official text: Phoenix clubs have +X Power.
Uses the generic ordered brand-target pipeline with stat=power.
Official text: The farthest club from Sunstorm has +X stats.
The official level value is added to Power, Control, and Spin of the unique farthest club.
If multiple clubs tie for the farthest position, strict mode fails and partial mode reports the ability as unresolved instead of inventing a tie rule.
Official text: The club to the left of Jumpstart has +X power.
Uses the generic left-neighbor stat-bonus pipeline with stat=power.
Official text: Bounces up to X times off of sand.
The official value is exposed as the source club's maximum sand bounce count.
Official text: The club to the left of Cyclotron has +X spin.
Uses the generic left-neighbor stat-bonus pipeline with stat=spin.
Official text: Stanchion clubs have +X Power.
Uses the generic ordered brand-target pipeline with stat=power.
Official text: Bounces up to 2 times off of water.
The official value is exposed as the source club's maximum water bounce count.

absent_types_stat_bonus.description: Apply a level-scaled stat bonus to configured targets only when the ordered bag contains none of the configured club types.

adjacent_stat_bonus_with_brand_multiplie.description: Apply a level value to every adjacent club and one additional copy to adjacent clubs sharing the source brand.

bag_multi_stat_tradeoff.description: Apply configured signed level components to multiple statistics on every non-source club.

filtered_bag_multi_stat_bonus.description: Apply one level value to configured statistics on every club matching configured rarities.

matching_targets_and_source_per_match.description: For every matching target, apply the same level-scaled stat bonus once to that target and once to the source club.

static_modifier_targets.description: Apply one additive static modifier value to every selected club.

filtered_static_modifier_targets.description: Apply one additive static modifier value to every bag club matching configured club types.

unique_farthest_multi_stat_bonus.description: Apply one level-scaled bonus to configured statistics of the unique farthest club in the ordered bag.
